facebook.caption:
5.0 stars. 48 reviews. Zero complaints.

BUM Coffee at 139 Đoàn Thị Điểm is pulling a perfect rating and it's not an accident. 48 people left reviews and every single one rounded up to five. That almost never happens.

If you're building a Phu Quoc café crawl, this one earns its spot on the list.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
